task_completion.description: Open the simple_model_rocket.ork file in OpenRocket.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenRocket GUI is visible with 'simple_model_rocket' displayed in the title bar or component tree.

task_completion.description: Add a streamer to the body tube and set it to deploy at apogee.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The component tree shows a 'Streamer' under the Body tube. The configuration dialog for the Streamer shows 'Deploys at: Apogee'.

task_completion.description: Configure the existing parachute to deploy at 50m altitude.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The configuration dialog for the Parachute shows 'Deploys at: Specific altitude' (or similar altitude setting) with a value of '50 m'.

task_completion.description: Configure the simulation for 12.0 m/s average windspeed and run it.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Edit Simulation dialog shows 'Average windspeed' set to 12.0 m/s, and the Simulations tab shows completed simulation results with updated drift and velocity.

task_completion.description: Save the updated rocket design file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks File -> Save, uses the Ctrl+S shortcut, or the OpenRocket window title bar no longer shows an asterisk (*) indicating unsaved changes.

task_completion.description: Write the post-flight analysis report to wind_mitigation_report.txt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window shows the creation of '/home/ga/Documents/exports/wind_mitigation_report.txt' containing the 12.0 m/s wind speed, total simulated drift, and ground hit velocity.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenRocket GUI to modify the rocket and run the simulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the OpenRocket graphical interface, rather than just editing the .ork XML file directly in a text editor.

integrity.description: The drift and ground hit velocity values in the report match the actual simulation results.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values typed into the wind_mitigation_report.txt match the output values visible in the OpenRocket Simulations tab.

integrity.description: The report file is actually saved to the correct directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses a text editor save dialog or terminal command (like echo or cat) directed specifically to /home/ga/Documents/exports/wind_mitigation_report.txt, not just printing to stdout.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target file is /home/ga/Documents/rockets/simple_model_rocket.ork. The simulation wind speed must be exactly 12.0 m/s. The parachute must be configured to deploy at exactly 50.0m altitude. The report must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/exports/wind_mitigation_report.txt and contain the tested wind speed, total simulated drift, and ground hit velocity.
